gene_region.label: SCN5A transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical SCN5A genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window relative to the reverse-strand transcription start, used to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: SCN5A encodes the Nav1.5 cardiac sodium channel alpha subunit, the main driver of fast inward sodium current in cardiomyocyte depolarization and cardiac conduction.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local SCN5A bundle is cardiac-channelopathy oriented. SCN5A interpretation requires exact allele, ECG/phenotype, inheritance, ancestry, and expert variant classification.
variant_effect_overview: SCN5A variants can produce gain- or loss-of-function effects depending on channel gating, trafficking, and cellular context.
Common modifiers such as H558R are not equivalent to pathogenic Brugada, long-QT, conduction disease, or cardiomyopathy variants.
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: SCN5A methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a cardiac voltage-gated sodium channel Nav1.5 gating, conduction velocity, depolarization, and arrhythmia biology gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for SCN5A.
Because SCN5A biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.
Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against cardiac voltage-gated sodium channel Nav1.5 gating, conduction velocity, depolarization, and arrhythmia biology.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use SCN5A promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for cardiac voltage-gated sodium channel Nav1.5 gating, conduction velocity, depolarization, and arrhythmia biology.

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000183873: SCN5A coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: SCN5A biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: cardiac voltage-gated sodium channel Nav1.5 gating, conduction velocity, depolarization, and arrhythmia biology
recommended_icons: ATP sensitive potassium channel (open, in membrane)
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests an SCN5A Nav1.5 thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to cardiac sodium current, conduction velocity, arrhythmia susceptibility, channel trafficking/gating, or clinical channelopathy review. Exact classification and phenotype are essential.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: rs1805124 (SCN5A H558R) is curated as a SCN5A marker for Cardiac conduction and arrhythmia biology, Brugada/long-QT/conduction disease review context. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the cardiac voltage-gated sodium channel Nav1.5 gating, conduction velocity, depolarization, and arrhythmia biology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag cardiac voltage-gated sodium channel Nav1.5 gating, conduction velocity, depolarization, and arrhythmia biology.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
research_context: Use this marker as a SCN5A pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair rs1805124 (SCN5A H558R) with SCN5A methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.
